promotion_rule: Repeated model conclusions are not independent evidence; cluster status is bounded by exact source locators and the weakest unresolved source-to-sink step.

canonical_clusters.title: Firm-specific operating ontology
source_to_sink: attorney answers or prior work product
later review, drafting, escalation, or governance workflow
canonical_clusters.does_not_prove: Provider custody, retention, training, cross-customer pooling, uniqueness, or economic value.

canonical_clusters.title: Decision-to-policy calibration loop
source_to_sink: accepted deviation, outcome, or attorney rationale
proposed reusable playbook or profile update
canonical_clusters.does_not_prove: Automatic learning, provider-side derivation, or use outside the customer context.

canonical_clusters.title: Durable matter and investigation memory
source_to_sink: local matter history or evidentiary corpus
later analysis, decision record, or archive
canonical_clusters.does_not_prove: Remote copying, provider access, deletion behavior, or deployed cross-matter access.

canonical_clusters.title: Remote connector and hosted-agent trust boundaries
canonical_clusters.does_not_prove: Credentials, grants, traffic, tenant behavior, provider retention, or secondary use.

canonical_clusters.title: Governed third-party skill supply chain
canonical_clusters.does_not_prove: Runtime enforcement or absence of compromised approved content.

canonical_clusters.title: Isolation and human-gate counterevidence
source_to_sink: separate writer or human approval gate
canonical_clusters.does_not_prove: Deployed enforcement, complete tenant isolation, or harmlessness.

preserved_dissent: Broad connector or messaging declarations are real trust boundaries, but they are not evidence that legal artifacts were transmitted.
Local-path persistence supports a benign customer-adaptation architecture and does not resolve what inference requests or hosted features retain.
Prompt-level safeguards are evidence of intended controls, not proof of technical enforcement.
remaining_gaps: Feature-specific retention, deletion, support-access, evaluation, and training terms
Tenant configuration and actual connector grants/traffic
Runtime enforcement of prompt-described isolation and approval controls
Cross-customer normalization or generalized reuse evidence
Remaining 33 unknown or incomplete public PR records
